name: Mushrooms in Parchment
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients together.
2. Place serving-sized portions on parchment squares.
3. Fold the edges to seal each portion.
4. Place the parchment bundles on a baking sheet.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F. for 7 to 8 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
Makes about 6 servings.
